channel.title: Sidefy Blog
channel.description: Discover the latest product updates, features, and insights from Sidefy

item.title: System Translation, Color Bar Sharing, External Events & On-Device Learning
item.description: Apple system translation, a color bar share card, External Events via MCP, Core ML behavior learning, and RSS feed icons.
item.author: Sidefy Team

item.title: Share Your Day as a Color Bar Chart
item.description: Sidefy is adding a share card for today’s timeline color bars—a double-ring clock image you can share, copy, or save.
item.author: Sidefy Team

item.title: External Events: Let External Tools Put Any Event on Your Timeline
item.description: A built-in plugin that lets external tools write events to your Sidefy timeline via MCP — from a chat assistant or a scheduled agent.
item.author: Sidefy Team

item.title: On-Device Behavior Learning: A Core ML Stack for Your Timeline
item.description: Sidefy is adding an on-device engagement learning pipeline—Create ML training, NLModel inference, and implicit signal collection—that learns RSS interest from how you browse, with no cloud uploads.
item.author: Sidefy Team

item.title: MCP Server: Let AI Assistants Manage Sidefy
item.description: An experimental localhost MCP endpoint that exposes Sidefy plugins, RSS, GitHub, rules, external events, and more as tools for MCP clients.
item.author: Sidefy Team

item.title: UI Refresh, Magazine Bubble Layout & Performance Optimizations
item.description: Redesigned plugin and rules surfaces, a new Magazine detailed bubble layout, RSS category and image detection, GitHub plugin edit sheet, and major performance improvements.
item.author: Sidefy Team

item.title: Memory Leak Fixes and Stability Improvements Across WebView, Plugins, and RSS
item.description: In this optimization round, we tracked down multiple memory-growth paths and shipped targeted fixes across WebView, translation, plugin execution, and RSS processing.
item.author: Sidefy Team

item.title: Clearer Bubble Layout: Magazine Style for Detailed Events
item.description: Coming soon: an optional magazine-style layout for detailed event bubbles—clearer source, title, time, and footer order, with the same bubble shortcuts, color bars, and neon accents you already use.
item.author: Sidefy Team

item.title: UI Refresh for macOS 26
item.description: A first look at Sidefy's upcoming interface update: native-aligned layouts and visuals tuned for macOS 26, with before-and-after comparisons across key screens.
item.author: Sidefy Team

item.title: Custom Shortcuts & Automatic Memory Cleanup
item.description: Customize keyboard shortcuts to match your workflow, plus automatic memory cleanup for a smoother experience.
item.author: Sidefy Team

item.title: SideScript 2.0 & Font Customization
item.description: Introducing SideScript 2.0 with TEMPLATE syntax and WHEN contexts, font customization, AI translation enhancements, and Experimental Features.
item.author: Sidefy Team

item.title: SideScript 2.0: Extended TEMPLATE Syntax
item.description: Learn TEMPLATE syntax for reusable rule groups and WHEN context for external conditions in SideScript 2.0.
item.author: Sidefy Team

item.title: Rule Engine & System Enhancements
item.description: The largest New Year's update since the app's initial release, featuring the all-new Rule Engine and major system enhancements.
item.author: Sidefy Team

item.title: FreshRSS Plugin for Sidefy is here
item.description: Seamlessly integrate your FreshRSS feeds into the Sidefy timeline.
item.author: Sidefy Team

item.title: Long-Awaited Custom Timeline Range
item.description: A highly requested feature is coming soon: customize your timeline range to focus on the hours that matter most.
item.author: Sidefy Team

item.title: New Reader Mode: Native Toolbar & Sidebar
item.description: Another highly anticipated feature is on the way: a refactored reader mode with a fully native toolbar and sidebar.
item.author: Sidefy Team

item.title: SideScript Syntax Guide
item.description: A comprehensive guide to SideScript, the domain-specific language for defining event rules in Sidefy.
item.author: Sidefy Team

item.title: Rule Engine: The Future of Event Automation
item.description: Announcing a powerful rule engine system in Sidefy that will transform how you customize and manage your events.
item.author: Sidefy Team

item.title: Bubble Font Type & Relative Time
item.description: Added bubble font type customization and relative time display options.
item.author: Sidefy Team

item.title: Keyword Highlighting & Web Scraping
item.description: Keyword highlighting, filtering, custom plugin web scraping capabilities, and major performance improvements.
item.author: Sidefy Team

item.title: UI Improvements & Apple Intelligence
item.description: Major UI redesign with improved reading experience, Apple Intelligence integration, and significant performance enhancements.
item.author: Sidefy Team

item.title: Adaptive Colors & Auto Translation
item.description: Adaptive color adjustments for better readability, automatic title translation, and enhanced reader navigation.
item.author: Sidefy Team

item.title: Colorless Mode & Customization
item.description: Enhanced readability with colorless mode, customizable color bar width, 12/24-hour format toggle, and improved multi-display support.
item.author: Sidefy Team

item.title: Architecture Refactor & Event Hiding
item.description: Complete architecture refactor separating data fetching and rendering, event hiding feature, and enhanced plugin export capabilities.
item.author: Sidefy Team

item.title: Image Support & Security Hardening
item.description: Introduced image event support, significant memory optimizations, and comprehensive plugin security enhancements.
item.author: Sidefy Team

item.title: LLM API Support
item.description: Added support for Large Language Model (LLM) APIs to enhance custom and community plugin capabilities.
item.author: Sidefy Team

item.title: Online Plugins
item.description: Introduced online plugin functionality, allowing users to download and update popular plugins directly from the repository.
item.author: Sidefy Team

item.title: Neon Mode & Custom Plugins
item.description: Added Neon Mode, Custom Plugins (Beta), mouse interaction mode, and RSS OPML import support.
item.author: Sidefy Team

item.title: Cross-Desktop & Keyboard Navigation
item.description: Initial release featuring cross-desktop support, keyboard navigation, event enhancements, and GitHub plugin optimizations.
item.author: Sidefy Team

item.title: Welcome to Sidefy
item.description: The first public release of Sidefy - your Mac sidebar information hub with calendar, reminders, and RSS feeds.
item.author: Sidefy Team
